zh.lifeSummary: 當Benoni Clark於1693年2月17日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾諾薩普頓時，他的父親William Clark Jr.36歲，母親Hannah Strong33歲。他於1718年11月6日與Hannah Root在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦勒班農結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和9個女兒的父母。他於1693年住在美國麻薩諸塞州哈普爾諾薩普頓。他去世於大約1769年在美國康乃狄克州劍橋大學默里 倫敦勒班農享年77歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Benoni Clark于1693年2月17日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾諾薩普頓时，他的父亲William Clark Jr.36岁，母亲Hannah Strong33岁。他于1718年11月6日与Hannah Root在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦勒班農结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和9个女儿的父母。他于1693年住在美国马萨诸塞州哈普爾諾薩普頓。他去世于大约1769年在美国康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦勒班農享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: Clark
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English clerk, clark ‘clerk, cleric, writer’ (Old French clerc; see Clerc ). The original sense was ‘man in a religious order, cleric, clergyman’. As all writing and secretarial work in medieval Christian Europe was normally done by members of the clergy, the term clerk came to mean ‘scholar, secretary, recorder, or penman’ as well as ‘cleric’. As a surname, it was particularly common for one who had taken only minor holy orders. In medieval Christian Europe, clergy in minor orders were permitted to marry and so found families; thus the surname could become established.
Irish (Westmeath, Mayo): in Ireland the English surname was frequently adopted, partly by translation for Ó Cléirigh; see Cleary .
Americanized form of Dutch   De Klerk   or Flemish   De Clerck   or of variants of these names, and possibly also of French   Clerc  . Compare   Clerk   2 and   De Clark  .

variants.name: Clarke
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Clark  .

History: This name was brought independently to New England by many bearers from the 17th century onward. Nicholas Clarke was one of the founders of Hartford, CT (coming from Cambridge, MA with Thomas Hooker) in 1635.

variants.name: Clerk
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Pierre, Jacques.
Americanized form of French   Clerc   and perhaps also of the Dutch and Flemish cognates   De Klerk   and   De Clerck   or of variants of these names. Compare   Clark   3.

variants.name: Clerkin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Liam, Brendan, Dympna, Seamus.

Irish (Monaghan): from an Irish pet form of English clerk ‘cleric’ (Irish cléireach), see Clark . Alternatively, an Anglicized form of Ó Cléireacháin, ‘descendant of little cleric’, an Irish diminutive of the word. See also McClurkin , an Antrim surname from Mac Cléirchín ‘son of little cleric’.

variants.name: Calarco
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rocco, Angelo, Carmelo, Fausto, Nunziato, Salvatore.
Italian (southern): probably a nickname derived from Greek kalē archē ‘good beginning’. Compare Clark 4.

variants.name: Clerc
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Odette, Sebastien, Serge.

French: occupational or status name for a member of a minor religious order or for a scholar, Old French clerc, from Late Latin clericus, from Greek klērikos, a derivative of klēros ‘inheritance, legacy’, with reference to the priestly tribe of Levites (see Levy ) ‘whose inheritance was the Lord’. In medieval Christian Europe, clergy in minor orders were permitted to marry and so found families; thus the surname could become established. In the Middle Ages it was virtually only members of religious orders who learned to read and write, so that the term clerc later came to denote any literate man, a scholar (hence its modern meaning ‘scribe, secretary’ or ‘clerk’). Compare Leclerc .

variants.name: Clarkson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): patronymic from   Clark  .

nameMeanings.name: Benoni
meanings: Hebrew: Son of grief or trouble

en.lifeSummary: When Benoni Clark was born on 17 February 1693, in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, his father, William Clark Jr., was 36 and his mother, Hannah Strong, was 33. He married Hannah Root on 6 November 1718, in Lebanon, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 9 daughters. He lived in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts, United States in 1693. He died about 1769, in Lebanon, New London, Connecticut, United States, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Benoni Clark est né le 17 février 1693, à Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, William Clark Jr., avait 36 ans et sa mère, Hannah Strong, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Hannah Root le 6 novembre 1718, à Lebanon, New London, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 9 filles. Il a vécu à Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts, États-Unis en 1693. Il est décédé environ 1769, à Lebanon, New London, Connecticut, États-Unis, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Benoni Clark am 17. Februar 1693 in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Clark Jr. 36 und seine Mutter Hannah Strong 33. Er hat am 6. November 1718 in Lebanon, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America Hannah Root geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 9 Töchter. 1693 hat er in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Er starb um 1769 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Lebanon, New London, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Benoni Clark è nato il il 17 febbraio 1693 nel Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, il suo padre, William Clark Jr., aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Hannah Strong, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Hannah Root il 6 novembre 1718, nel Lebanon, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 9 figlie. Vissuto a Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1693. Morì circa 1769, nel Lebanon, New London, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Benoni Clarkが1693年2月17日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアノーサンプトンで生まれた時，父William Clark Jr.は36歳，母Hannah Strongは33歳であった。1718年11月6日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ロンドンレバノンでHannah Rootと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼は1693年にはアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ハンプシュアイアノーサンプトンに住んでいた。彼は約1769年にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ニュー ロンドンレバノンで77歳で死去した。

ko.Lebanon, New Haven, Connecticut Colony,: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 레바넌
ko.Lebanon, New London, Connecticut Colony,: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 레바넌
ko.Lebanon, Connecticut Colony, British Col: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 레바넌
ko.Lebanon, New London, Connecticut, Britis: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 레바넌
ko.Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Ba: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 노르섬프턴
ko.Lebanon, New London, Connecticut, United: 미국 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 레바넌
ko.lifeSummary: Benoni Clark(이)가 1693년 2월 17일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 노르섬프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Clark Jr.(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Hannah Strong(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1718년 11월 6일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 레바넌에서 Hannah Root(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 1693년도에 미국 매사추세츠 주 함프실르 노르섬프턴에서 살았다. 그는 대략 1769년 미국 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 레바넌에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Benoni Clark nasceu em 17 de fevereiro de 1693, em Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, William Clark Jr., tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Hannah Strong, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Hannah Root em 6 de novembro de 1718, em Lebanon, New London, Conecticute, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 9 filhas. Ele viveu em Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América em 1693. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1769, em Lebanon, New London, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Benoni Clark родился 17 февраля 1693 г. в местности нортамптон, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени William Clark Jr. было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Hannah Strong, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Hannah Root 6 ноября 1718 г. в местности лебанон, ню лондон, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 9 дочерей. Он жил в местности нортамптон, хампшир, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в 1693 году. Он умер около 1769 г. в местности лебанон, ню лондон, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 77 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Benoni Clark nació el 17 de febrero de 1693, en Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, William Clark Jr., tenía 36 años y su mamá, Hannah Strong, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Hannah Root el 6 de noviembre de 1718, en Lebanon, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 9 hijas. Vivió en Northampton, Hampshire, Masachusets, Estados Unidos en 1693. Murió aproximadamente 1769, en Lebanon, New London, Connecticut, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 77 años.
